STANDARD.intent: Seated adult, upright but slightly elevated. Eye height 2.2u, pulled closer to table (z=7.5). Looking across table to mid-zone. Dice station just barely in right periphery. Shelf visible at bottom. Orb visible upper-center.
acceptance: shelf visible at bottom of frame
dice station barely at right edge
reads like sitting across a real table

DOWN.intent: Player looks almost straight down to read. High Y (3.8), pulled back (z=5.8), narrow FOV (38). Steep near-vertical angle. Camera centered on notebook (x=-0.2). Looks at z=5.1 so shelf rail clears bottom of frame.
acceptance: notebook pages visible without rail obstruction
shelf objects face camera — minimal foreshortening

LEAN_FORWARD.intent: Player leans forward, near top-down survey of battle map. High Y (5.0), close in (z=4.0). Looking straight down at vault center (z=0.0). Steep pitch. Parchment map cover fills most of frame. Orb visible at far edge.
acceptance: parchment vault cover fills majority of frame
reads like leaning over a battle map

DICE_TRAY.intent: Player turns head right from seated position to look at dice tray (player zone, z=3.8). Eye at seated height (y=2.2). Looking rightward and steeply down at tray/tower. Tray and tower dominate frame with orb far left.

BOOK_READ.intent: Player looks straight down at rulebook (tome at x=2.0, z=5.1). High Y (2.4) for steep angle. Narrow FOV (38deg). Camera positioned directly above the tome. Page fills frame with minimal foreshortening.
